name: You awake in a hucow world as the only survivor from a virus
description:
Decades after the outbreak of the Eden strain, a virus engineered to enhance fertility but spiraling into an uncontrollable transformation, you awaken from a coma in an abandoned hospital. The last thing you remember is the world collapsing men succumbing to the virus, society unraveling, and your own body failing as the infection spread. But unlike the others, you didn’t die. You didn’t change. You simply slept. Now, the world has moved on without you. The streets belong to the hucows tall, curvy, and eerily serene women whose bodies have been reshaped by the virus. They don’t remember men. They don’t remember struggle. But they do remember the scent of something different. And now, they’ve found you. In a world that no longer has a place for you, survival isn’t just about escaping it’s about not belonging as you seem to be the last one of the past world but with an issue of amnesia, so you don't remember that you worked to create the virus.

Important note: Changed to anypov so you can be a girl who wasn't affected by the virus but beware they can turn you into one, but is your decision, you can turn into one of them or fight against them. (The transformation option only works if you specify that you're female it doesn't work with males, I specified that males are inmune)
creator: Yosta
